---
title: "Getting Started"
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
using GeoDataAccess
using GeoDataAccess: Cache, MetaData, DataAccessPlan, fetch!, fetch_data, name,
    all_sources, available_sources
using Dates
import GeoInterface as GI
using GeoInterface.Extents: Extent
using JSON3
```

## Imports

GeoDataAccess.jl does not export symbols by default.  Import what you need explicitly:

```julia
using GeoDataAccess
using GeoDataAccess: DataAccessPlan, fetch!, fetch_data, MetaData, Cache
using Dates
import GeoInterface as GI
```

## Workflow

Every data request follows two steps:

1. **Plan** — `DataAccessPlan(source, extent, start_date, stop_date; kw...)` builds a plan describing the API calls that will be made, without executing them.
2. **Fetch** — `fetch!(plan)` executes the plan, downloads data, and returns file paths to cached JSON files.

The convenience function `fetch_data(...)` combines both steps.

## Open-Meteo Archive

[Open-Meteo Archive](https://open-meteo.com/) provides global historical weather data from the
ERA5 reanalysis dataset (1940–present) at ~25 km resolution.  No API key is required.

### Hourly Data

```{julia}
plan = DataAccessPlan(OpenMeteoArchive(), (-74.0, 40.7),
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 3);
    variables = [:temperature_2m, :precipitation],
    frequency = :hourly)
```

```{julia}
files = fetch!(plan)
data = JSON3.read(read(files[1]))
keys(data)
```

### Daily Data

Daily aggregates use different variable names (e.g. `temperature_2m_max` instead of `temperature_2m`):

```{julia}
files = fetch_data(OpenMeteoArchive(), (-74.0, 40.7),
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 7);
    variables = [:temperature_2m_max, :temperature_2m_min, :precipitation_sum],
    frequency = :daily)

data = JSON3.read(read(files[1]))
keys(data)
```

## Open-Meteo Forecast

[Open-Meteo Forecast](https://open-meteo.com/) provides up to 16-day weather forecasts at ~9 km
resolution.  The interface is the same as the archive source:

```{julia}
plan = DataAccessPlan(OpenMeteoForecast(), (-74.0, 40.7),
    today(), today() + Day(2);
    variables = [:temperature_2m, :precipitation],
    frequency = :hourly)
plan
```

## NOAA NCEI

[NOAA NCEI](https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/) provides historical station-based observations.
You must specify station IDs via the `stations` keyword:

```{julia}
plan = DataAccessPlan(NOAANCEI(), (-74.0, 40.7),
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 7);
    stations = ["USW00094728"],  # Central Park, NYC
    variables = [:TMAX, :TMIN, :PRCP])
plan
```

```{julia}
files = fetch!(plan)
data = JSON3.read(read(files[1]))
length(data)  # number of records
```

::: {.callout-note}
Station IDs can be found at [NOAA's Station Search](https://www.ncdc.noaa.gov/cdo-web/datatools/findstation).
The `extent` argument is currently unused for NOAA NCEI — data is fetched by station ID.
:::

## NASA POWER

[NASA POWER](https://power.larc.nasa.gov/) provides global daily meteorological and solar energy
data (1981–present) at ~55 km resolution.  No API key is required.

```{julia}
plan = DataAccessPlan(NASAPower(), (-74.0, 40.7),
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 7);
    variables = [:T2M, :PRECTOTCORR])
plan
```

```{julia}
files = fetch!(plan)
data = JSON3.read(read(files[1]))
keys(data)
```

NASA POWER also supports regional bounding box queries (requires at least 2° in each dimension):

```{julia}
ext = Extent(X=(-76.0, -72.0), Y=(39.0, 42.0))

plan = DataAccessPlan(NASAPower(), ext,
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 7);
    variables = [:T2M])
plan
```

## Tomorrow.io

[Tomorrow.io](https://www.tomorrow.io/) provides high-resolution (4 km) global weather data.
Requires a free API key set as the `TOMORROW_IO_API_KEY` environment variable.

```julia
ENV["TOMORROW_IO_API_KEY"] = "your-api-key"

plan = DataAccessPlan(TomorrowIO(), (-74.0, 40.7),
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 7);
    variables = [:temperature, :humidity, :precipitationIntensity],
    timestep = "1d")
files = fetch!(plan)
```

## Visual Crossing

[Visual Crossing](https://www.visualcrossing.com/) provides ~50 years of historical weather
data at ~1 km resolution.  Requires a free API key set as the `VISUAL_CROSSING_API_KEY`
environment variable.

```julia
ENV["VISUAL_CROSSING_API_KEY"] = "your-api-key"

plan = DataAccessPlan(VisualCrossing(), (-74.0, 40.7),
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 7);
    variables = [:tempmax, :tempmin, :precip, :humidity],
    include = "days")
files = fetch!(plan)
```

## GeoInterface Integration

`DataAccessPlan` (and `fetch_data`) accept any
[GeoInterface.jl](https://github.com/JuliaGeo/GeoInterface.jl)-compatible geometry as the
spatial extent.  The geometry type determines how coordinates are sent to the API:

| Geometry | Behavior |
|----------|----------|
| `Point` / `Tuple` | Single coordinate query |
| `MultiPoint` | One query per point |
| `LineString` | One query per vertex |
| `Polygon` | Bounding box / corner point queries |
| `Extent` | Bounding box / corner point queries |

### Multi-Point Query

```{julia}
mp = GI.MultiPoint([(-74.0, 40.7), (-87.6, 41.9)])

plan = DataAccessPlan(OpenMeteoArchive(), mp,
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 2);
    variables = [:temperature_2m], frequency = :hourly)
plan
```

### Extent Query

```{julia}
ext = Extent(X=(-74.0, -73.5), Y=(40.7, 40.9))

plan = DataAccessPlan(OpenMeteoArchive(), ext,
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 1, 2);
    variables = [:temperature_2m_max], frequency = :daily)
plan
```

## Plotting with Makie

### Animated Temperature Map

Fetch daily max temperature over a grid of points across the US Northeast and animate it
on a map using [GeoMakie.jl](https://github.com/MakieOrg/GeoMakie.jl):

```{julia}
#| code-fold: true
using CairoMakie, GeoMakie

# Build a grid of points covering the Northeast US
lons = -80.0:1.5:-68.0
lats = 36.0:1.0:45.0
grid_points = vec([(_lon, _lat) for _lon in lons, _lat in lats])
mp = GI.MultiPoint(grid_points)

files = fetch_data(OpenMeteoArchive(), mp,
    Date(2024, 7, 1), Date(2024, 7, 14);
    variables = [:temperature_2m_max], frequency = :daily)

results = [JSON3.read(read(f)) for f in files]

dates = results[1].daily.time
grid_lons = [p[1] for p in grid_points]
grid_lats = [p[2] for p in grid_points]

# Global color range across all days
all_temps = vcat([collect(r.daily.temperature_2m_max) for r in results]...)
cmin, cmax = extrema(skipmissing(all_temps))
```

```{julia}
#| code-fold: true
day_idx = Observable(1)
temps = @lift([r.daily.temperature_2m_max[$day_idx] for r in results])
title = @lift("Daily Max Temperature — " * string(dates[$day_idx]))

fig = Figure(size=(700, 500))
ga = GeoAxis(fig[1, 1]; dest="+proj=merc",
    limits=(-82, -66, 34, 47),
    title=title)
lines!(ga, GeoMakie.coastlines(); color=:gray40, linewidth=0.75)
sc = scatter!(ga, grid_lons, grid_lats;
    color=temps, colormap=:RdYlBu_9, colorrange=(cmin, cmax),
    markersize=20)
Colorbar(fig[1, 2], sc; label="Temperature (°C)")

record(fig, "temperature_map.gif", eachindex(dates); framerate=3) do i
    day_idx[] = i
end
```

![](temperature_map.gif)

### Hourly Temperature Heatmap

Fetch hourly temperature for a single point over several days and visualize as a heatmap
(hour of day vs. date):

```{julia}
#| code-fold: true
files = fetch_data(OpenMeteoArchive(), (-74.0, 40.7),
    Date(2024, 7, 1), Date(2024, 7, 14);
    variables = [:temperature_2m], frequency = :hourly)

result = JSON3.read(read(files[1]))
temps_raw = collect(result.hourly.temperature_2m)
times_raw = result.hourly.time

temps = reshape(temps_raw, 24, :)
dates = unique([t[1:10] for t in times_raw])

fig = Figure(size=(800, 400))
ax = Axis(fig[1, 1];
    xlabel="Date", ylabel="Hour of Day",
    title="Hourly Temperature — NYC, July 2024",
    xticklabelrotation=pi/4)
hm = heatmap!(ax, 1:length(dates), 0:23, temps'; colormap=:RdYlBu_9)
ax.xticks = (1:2:length(dates), dates[1:2:end])
Colorbar(fig[1, 2], hm; label="Temperature (°C)")
fig
```

### Multi-City Precipitation Comparison

Use a `MultiPoint` geometry to compare precipitation across several cities:

```{julia}
#| code-fold: true
cities = GI.MultiPoint([
    (-74.0, 40.7),   # New York
    (-87.6, 41.9),   # Chicago
    (-122.4, 37.8),  # San Francisco
    (-80.2, 25.8),   # Miami
])
city_names = ["New York", "Chicago", "San Francisco", "Miami"]

files = fetch_data(OpenMeteoArchive(), cities,
    Date(2024, 1, 1), Date(2024, 12, 31);
    variables = [:precipitation_sum], frequency = :daily)

results = [JSON3.read(read(f)) for f in files]

# Compute monthly totals
fig = Figure(size=(800, 400))
ax = Axis(fig[1, 1];
    xlabel="Month", ylabel="Total Precipitation (mm)",
    title="Monthly Precipitation — 2024",
    xticks=(1:12, Dates.format.(Date(2024,1,1):Month(1):Date(2024,12,1), "u")))

for (i, (r, label)) in enumerate(zip(results, city_names))
    precip = collect(r.daily.precipitation_sum)
    times = r.daily.time
    months = [parse(Int, t[6:7]) for t in times]
    monthly = [sum(precip[months .== m]; init=0.0) for m in 1:12]
    barplot!(ax, (1:12) .+ (i - 2.5) * 0.2, monthly; width=0.2, label=label)
end
axislegend(ax; position=:lt, framevisible=false)
fig
```

## MetaData

Each data source has a `MetaData` method that describes its properties:

```{julia}
m = MetaData(OpenMeteoArchive())
```

```{julia}
m.variables
```

## Discovering Sources

```{julia}
# All registered sources
all_sources()
```

```{julia}
# Only sources that are currently usable (API key set or not required)
available_sources()
```

```{julia}
# Filter by domain
all_sources(domain = :weather)
```

## Caching

GeoDataAccess.jl caches API responses to disk via [Scratch.jl](https://github.com/JuliaPackaging/Scratch.jl).
Caching is enabled by default.

```{julia}
Cache.ENABLED[]  # check current state
```

```julia
# Disable caching
Cache.enable!(false)

# Re-enable caching
Cache.enable!(true)

# List cached files
Cache.list()

# Clear all cached data
Cache.clear!()
```

## Variable Reference

### Open-Meteo (Hourly)

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `temperature_2m` | Air temperature at 2m (°C) |
| `relative_humidity_2m` | Relative humidity at 2m (%) |
| `dew_point_2m` | Dew point at 2m (°C) |
| `apparent_temperature` | Apparent (feels-like) temperature (°C) |
| `precipitation` | Total precipitation (mm) |
| `rain` | Rain (mm) |
| `snowfall` | Snowfall (cm) |
| `snow_depth` | Snow depth (m) |
| `pressure_msl` | Mean sea level pressure (hPa) |
| `surface_pressure` | Surface pressure (hPa) |
| `cloud_cover` | Total cloud cover (%) |
| `wind_speed_10m` | Wind speed at 10m (km/h) |
| `wind_direction_10m` | Wind direction at 10m (°) |
| `wind_gusts_10m` | Wind gusts at 10m (km/h) |
| `shortwave_radiation` | Shortwave radiation (W/m²) |
| `weather_code` | WMO weather code |
| `et0_fao_evapotranspiration` | Reference evapotranspiration (mm) |
| `soil_temperature_0_to_7cm` | Soil temperature 0-7cm (°C) |
| `soil_moisture_0_to_7cm` | Soil moisture 0-7cm (m³/m³) |

### Open-Meteo (Daily)

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `temperature_2m_max` | Daily maximum temperature at 2m (°C) |
| `temperature_2m_min` | Daily minimum temperature at 2m (°C) |
| `temperature_2m_mean` | Daily mean temperature at 2m (°C) |
| `apparent_temperature_max` | Daily maximum apparent temperature (°C) |
| `apparent_temperature_min` | Daily minimum apparent temperature (°C) |
| `precipitation_sum` | Daily total precipitation (mm) |
| `rain_sum` | Daily total rain (mm) |
| `snowfall_sum` | Daily total snowfall (cm) |
| `wind_speed_10m_max` | Daily maximum wind speed at 10m (km/h) |
| `wind_gusts_10m_max` | Daily maximum wind gusts at 10m (km/h) |
| `wind_direction_10m_dominant` | Daily dominant wind direction (°) |
| `precipitation_hours` | Daily hours with precipitation |
| `sunrise` | Sunrise time (ISO8601) |
| `sunset` | Sunset time (ISO8601) |
| `sunshine_duration` | Sunshine duration (s) |
| `shortwave_radiation_sum` | Daily total shortwave radiation (MJ/m²) |

### NOAA NCEI

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `TMAX` | Maximum temperature (tenths of °C) |
| `TMIN` | Minimum temperature (tenths of °C) |
| `TAVG` | Average temperature (tenths of °C) |
| `PRCP` | Precipitation (tenths of mm) |
| `SNOW` | Snowfall (mm) |
| `SNWD` | Snow depth (mm) |
| `AWND` | Average wind speed (tenths of m/s) |
| `WSF2` | Fastest 2-minute wind speed (tenths of m/s) |
| `WDF2` | Direction of fastest 2-minute wind (°) |
| `WSF5` | Fastest 5-second wind speed (tenths of m/s) |
| `WDF5` | Direction of fastest 5-second wind (°) |
| `TSUN` | Total sunshine (minutes) |
| `PSUN` | Percent of possible sunshine (%) |

### NASA POWER

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `T2M` | Temperature at 2m (°C) |
| `T2M_MAX` | Maximum temperature at 2m (°C) |
| `T2M_MIN` | Minimum temperature at 2m (°C) |
| `T2M_RANGE` | Temperature range at 2m (°C) |
| `T2MDEW` | Dew/frost point at 2m (°C) |
| `RH2M` | Relative humidity at 2m (%) |
| `PRECTOTCORR` | Precipitation corrected (mm/day) |
| `WS2M` | Wind speed at 2m (m/s) |
| `WS10M` | Wind speed at 10m (m/s) |
| `WD2M` | Wind direction at 2m (°) |
| `WD10M` | Wind direction at 10m (°) |
| `PS` | Surface pressure (kPa) |
| `QV2M` | Specific humidity at 2m (g/kg) |
| `CLOUD_AMT` | Cloud amount (%) |
| `ALLSKY_SFC_SW_DWN` | All-sky surface shortwave downward irradiance (MJ/m²/day) |
| `CLRSKY_SFC_SW_DWN` | Clear-sky surface shortwave downward irradiance (MJ/m²/day) |
| `ALLSKY_SFC_LW_DWN` | All-sky surface longwave downward irradiance (W/m²) |

### Tomorrow.io

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `temperature` | Temperature (°C) |
| `temperatureApparent` | Apparent temperature (°C) |
| `temperatureMax` | Daily max temperature (°C) |
| `temperatureMin` | Daily min temperature (°C) |
| `humidity` | Humidity (%) |
| `dewPoint` | Dew point (°C) |
| `windSpeed` | Wind speed (m/s) |
| `windDirection` | Wind direction (°) |
| `windGust` | Wind gust (m/s) |
| `precipitationIntensity` | Precipitation intensity (mm/hr) |
| `precipitationProbability` | Precipitation probability (%) |
| `rainIntensity` | Rain intensity (mm/hr) |
| `snowIntensity` | Snow intensity (mm/hr) |
| `pressureSurfaceLevel` | Surface-level pressure (hPa) |
| `cloudCover` | Cloud cover (%) |
| `uvIndex` | UV index |
| `weatherCode` | Weather condition code |
| `visibility` | Visibility (km) |

### Visual Crossing

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `temp` | Temperature (°C) |
| `tempmax` | Maximum temperature (°C) |
| `tempmin` | Minimum temperature (°C) |
| `feelslike` | Feels-like temperature (°C) |
| `humidity` | Humidity (%) |
| `dew` | Dew point (°C) |
| `precip` | Precipitation (mm) |
| `snow` | Snowfall (cm) |
| `snowdepth` | Snow depth (cm) |
| `windspeed` | Wind speed (km/h) |
| `winddir` | Wind direction (°) |
| `windgust` | Wind gust (km/h) |
| `pressure` | Sea-level pressure (hPa) |
| `cloudcover` | Cloud cover (%) |
| `uvindex` | UV index |
| `visibility` | Visibility (km) |
| `conditions` | Weather conditions text |
| `sunrise` | Sunrise time |
| `sunset` | Sunset time |
| `moonphase` | Moon phase (0-1) |
